overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a dense orange sandstorm in an industrial urban district. The player navigates foggy streets with high-voltage power infrastructure, crosses intersections, passes under overpasses, and encounters scattered pedestrians amid concrete buildings and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with high voltage power infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the foggy industrial street toward an upcoming intersection

entered.detail: tall lattice steel transmission tower with multiple power lines
single palm tree visible through the orange fog
multiple overhead electrical transmission lines crossing the street
large concrete industrial building with minimal windows
low-rise industrial structure with flat roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy industrial street bathed in orange light. A massive high-voltage transmission tower looms on the left while power lines crisscross overhead. The player walks forward through the sparse pedestrian traffic toward an intersection visible in the distance.

events.description: crossing the intersection and entering the covered area beneath the overpass
ambient light drops significantly while moving under the concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and continuing forward under the overpass

entered.detail: large concrete overpass bridge spanning across the street overhead
traffic signal pole with illuminated lights
red and white striped construction barriers lining the sidewalk
massive concrete pillar supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the intersection and enters a darker, sheltered space beneath a massive concrete overpass. The lighting dims considerably compared to the open street. Red and white construction barriers line the right side as the player walks between large support pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon-lit industrial building

events.description: exiting the covered overpass back into the open foggy street
pedestrian density increases while approaching the next major intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing groups of pedestrians in both directions

entered.detail: large industrial building with prominent red neon lighting along the roofline
palm tree on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene opens back into the foggy orange atmosphere. A massive industrial building with striking red neon lights dominates the left side. The street becomes busier with pedestrians walking in both directions as the player approaches another intersection.

events.description: approaching the large intersection with digital billboard becoming visible

agents.ego_description: crossing the final intersection alongside other pedestrians

entered.detail: large digital advertising screen with red and white graphics
white painted pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player reaches a major intersection where a large digital billboard stands on the right. The crosswalk lines are visible on the foggy asphalt as the player crosses with a group of pedestrians. The industrial building with red neon lights recedes into the fog behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a hazy industrial district, moving from an open orange sandstorm into a sheltered underpass before emerging back into a neon-lit urban intersection. It begins on a foggy street dominated by a massive high-voltage transmission tower and crisscrossing power lines, moving forward through sparse pedestrian traffic. As the camera crosses an intersection, the scene shifts into the dim, shadowed space beneath a concrete overpass, passing between large support pillars and red and white construction barriers. The environment then opens back into the glowing orange atmosphere, where a massive industrial building with striking red neon lights looms on the left amid an increasing crowd of pedestrians. Finally, the camera reaches a major intersection, crossing foggy asphalt beside a large digital billboard as the red neon building recedes into the haze behind.
